name: @abdokouta/react-redis-monorepo
description: Client-side Redis connection management using Upstash HTTP API for React

scripts.clean:all: find . -type d \( -name node_modules -o -name dist -o -name .turbo -o -name coverage -o -name .cache \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && find . -type f \( -name '*.lock' -o -name pnpm-lock.yaml -o -name yarn.lock -o -name package-lock.json \) -delete
scripts.upgrade: ncu -u && ncu -u --cwd packages/* && ncu -u --cwd examples/* && pnpm install
